common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_error_unknown
error_list.description: The add on deal created by admin can't be edited

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_item_delete_error
error_list.description: At least one sub item should be added in add on deal

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: The purchase min spend and per gift num is not needed in add on discount

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: The purchase limit is not needed in gift with mini.spend

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: The start time of upcoming add on deal can't be shorted

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: Promotion end time can only be changed to an earlier timing.

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_time_error
error_list.description: The promotion period can't exceed 6 months

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_end_time_error
error_list.description: The end time should be 1 hour later than start time

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_expired
error_list.description: The expired add on deal can't be edited

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_delete_error
error_list.description: Only upcoming add on deal can be deleted

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_name_invalid
error_list.description: The name of add on deal can't exceed 25 characters

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_not_exists
error_list.description: The add on deal not existed

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_update_error
error_list.description: The {value} of ongoing add on deal can't be edited

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_page_no_error

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_page_size_error
error_list.description: Please input page type between 1-100

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_set_error
error_list.description: Please input per gift number between 1 to 50

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: Please input correct promotion purchase limit

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_status_error
error_list.description: Please input correct promotion status:all: 0, ongoing: 1, upcoming: 2, expired: 3

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_set_error
error_list.description: Please input purchase min spend

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: Please enter a discount price less than the original price

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_deal_set_error
error_list.description: Please input add on deal purchase limit between 1 to 100

error_list.name: add_on.add_on_edit_error
error_list.description: Please input correct priority

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_item_under_block_categories
error_list.description: This product is under a category that is prohibited from promotions due to regulations in your country

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_multi_tier_invalid_discount_value_per_item
error_list.description: higher tier should have higher discount per item (discount per item = discount value off / item amount)

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_max_span_beyond

error_list.name: follow_prize.end_time_max_limit

common_error_list.name: error_auth

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: shop_banned

request_params.name: add_on_deal_id
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an add on deal activity.

request_params.name: start_time
request_params.description: The time when bundle deal activity start.The start time must be 1 hour than current time.

request_params.name: end_time
request_params.description: The time when bundle deal activity end. The end time must be later than start time.

request_params.name: purchase_min_spend
request_params.description: The minimum purchase amount that needs to be met to buy the gift with min.Spend

request_params.name: per_gift_num
request_params.description: Number of gifts that buyers can get

request_params.name: promotion_purchase_limit
request_params.description: Max. number of add-on products that a customer can purchase per order.

request_params.name: add_on_deal_name
request_params.description: Title of the add on deal

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking

children.name: start_time
children.description: The time when add on deal activity start.

children.name: end_time
children.description: The time when add on deal activity end

children.name: promotion_type
children.description: The type of add on deal：add on discount =0；gift with mini spend=1
